features: ESSENTIAL NAIL ART TOOLS: Pack of 10 professional nail files, these nail files work quickly to trim or shape the acrylic nail with your desired shape or length.They are also perfect to remove nail gel in your extended or fake nails. Also suitable for Pet Grooming!
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: The 100/180 Nail Files are made with top quality adhesive tape and emery board materials. Quick & Easy to clean & water resistant!

NECESSARY IN SALONS AND HOME: Great for all your filing needs, Nails, Hobbies, Crafts. Must have in professional salons and daily nail art at home. Sometimes you needn’t cost so much in a beauty salon anymore!
THE BEST GIFT: Great stocking stuffers for girls who love nail art, can be birthday gift, Valentines gift & Christmas gift!
description: Product Description Great choice for all your filing needs Remove varnish Nail files for acrylic File false nail tips Nail files for natural nails 100/180 Grit Double Sided Nail Filer • 100 Grit: extra coarseness, excellent choice for filing acrylic nails and removing nail gel or varnish; • 180 Grit: medium coarseness, great choice for natural nails to shape nail edge and refine shape; Durable & Sturdy Emery Boards for Nails • Exclusive high quality sandpaper, incredibly coarse and sharp, can work quickly to remove varnish and trim acrylic nail; • ECO sponge on second layer, no smell; • Strong PP board in the middle, not easy to bend; • Washable material easily clean and long lasting use, time and money saving.
